description: Implement Posner's spatial cueing paradigm in PsychoPy Builder for a cognitive neuroscience study on attentional orienting. The experiment must follow a trial sequence of fixation (500ms), cue (200ms), blank ISI (100ms), and target (until response or 2000ms timeout). Include valid (cue matches target), invalid (cue opposite target), and neutral (center cue) conditions for both left and right target locations, with participants using 'left' and 'right' keys to indicate target location. Create a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/posner_conditions.csv with columns cue_location, target_location, cue_validity, and corrAns, covering at least the six unique condition combinations. The experiment structure must include instructions, fixation, cue, target with response collection, a trial loop, and a debrief routine. Save the experiment as /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/posner_cueing_experiment.psyexp. Login: user ga, password password123.
